message:
fix(types): human-readable cancelled Display and Infinity-safe threshold

Two fixes:

1. OutcomeError::Cancelled Display: was using {:?} (Debug format) for
   the CancelReason, producing output like "cancelled: CancelReason { ... }".
   Now uses {} (Display format), producing "cancelled: timeout: budget elapsed".

2. SymbolSet threshold_reached: +Infinity overhead now correctly returns
   false (threshold can never be reached) instead of falling through to
   minimum_threshold. Matches the same fix applied to required_symbols()
   in decoding.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
